evidence: making significant investments... in startups developing technologies in aerospace, next-generation air traffic control and aviation infrastructure, energy transition and AI-driven travel innovation
may require significant expenditures, human resources, the development of effective internal controls and the transformation of business and financial processes

if AI is improperly utilized, including if the content, analyses, or recommendations that AI applications assist in producing are or are alleged to be deficient, inaccurate, or biased, we would be exposed to new or expanded risks and liabilities
